arts.ttl: Man City could use 'Claudio Echeverri card' to beat Real Madrid, PSG to £41.6m transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City could use teenage midfield talent Claudio Echeverri as a bargaining chip in their pursuit of Lazio defender Mario Gila, according to a report.

arts.sum: Achraf Hakimi has established himself as a leader at Paris Saint-Germain this season, sometimes even wearing the captain’s armband. Nonetheless, if it were up to his entourage, this entire scenario might not have happened. arts.ttl: Barcelona Willing to Offer Liverpool Veteran Two-Year Contract Amid PSG Links
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have focused on signing young, up-and-coming talent in recent transfer windows, but both Luis Enrique and Luis Campos understand the importance of experience—as long as it aligns with the club’s culture and playing style. arts.ttl: Real Madrid View €18M-Rated AC Milan Standout as Plan B to Liverpool, PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain had its eye on Dean Huijsen last summer as part of a defensive overhaul, but the Spanish center-back ended up joining AFC Bournemouth instead. If PSG revisits its interest, it won’t be alone in the race. arts.ttl: Man United Racing to Edge Liverpool for £67M-Rated Standout With PSG Sell-on Clause
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will keep a close eye on Hugo Ekitike’s potential move to Eintracht Frankfurt, as they’re set to receive a percentage of the transfer fee. arts.ttl: Saudi Arabia Continues Strong Interest in Man Utd Ace, Paving Way for €30M-rated PSG Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are facing uncertainty in goal, with Gianluigi Donnarumma’s future up in the air. If the club decides to part ways with the 26-year-old, they’ll need to find a replacement in the transfer market. Donnarumma’s contract runs through 2026, but past mistakes have raised concerns, prompting PSG to look for long-term options. arts.ttl: Newcastle Unwilling to Accept Liverpool Player in Deal for £150M-Rated PSG Target
arts.sum: The winter transfer window closed with Alexander Isak still at Newcastle United. While there wasn’t much talk about a move in January, reports suggest PSG and other clubs could make a stronger push for him this summer. arts.ttl: PSG Have Eyes on €40M-Rated Liverpool Target Who Will Replace Virgil Van Dijk
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could be looking to bolster its backline this summer as it continues to inject younger talent into the defense. Over the past few transfer windows, Lucas Beraldo and Willian Pacho arrived, and another name could be coming soon. arts.ttl: What Emiliano Martínez Expects From Hostile French Crowd in Aston Villa-PSG Champions League Tie
arts.sum: The FIFA international break is over, and club football is back, with the UEFA Champions League quarterfinals taking center stage. arts.ttl: Marseille condemn 'personal attacks' on Rabiot at PSG
arts.sum: Marseille condemn the "personal attacks" aimed at midfielder Adrien Rabiot and his family during the 3-1 defeat at Paris St-Germain on Sunday.
